Tool_car_loan_emi_Description: Car loan EMI with down payment, insurance, and prepayment analysis.
Tool_car_loan_emi_LearnText: Car loans are shorter than home loans and usually cost more interest. A larger down payment and shorter tenure cut total interest sharply. Financing insurance raises the loan amount.
Tool_car_loan_emi_FormulaNote: EMI uses reducing-balance monthly compounding. Prepayment after year 1 is illustrative — banks may charge fees or recalculate tenure instead of EMI.
Tool_car_loan_emi_InsuranceHint: Leave 0 if you pay insurance separately.
Tool_car_loan_emi_PrepayHint: Optional. Shows revised EMI and interest saved.
Tool_car_loan_emi_PrepayBody: After a year-1 prepayment, revised EMI ≈ {0}. Estimated interest saved ≈ {1}.
Tool_car_loan_emi_ExampleTitle: Worked example: ₹10 lakh car, ₹2 lakh down
Tool_car_loan_emi_ExampleStep_3: EMI is calculated on the reducing balance.
Tool_car_loan_emi_ExampleStep_5: A prepayment after year 1 lowers remaining interest.
Tool_car_loan_emi_Step_1: Compute financed amount after down payment.
Tool_car_loan_emi_Step_2: Add any financed insurance or accessories.
Tool_car_loan_emi_Info_Abbreviation: Car loan EMI — auto finance instalment
Tool_car_loan_emi_Info_Purpose: Estimate monthly car EMI, total interest, and prepayment impact.
Tool_car_loan_emi_Info_WhyKnow: Dealers often quote EMI without showing total interest or the cost of financing insurance.
Tool_car_loan_emi_Info_RealLife: Buying a car, comparing bank vs dealer finance, planning a down payment.
Tool_car_loan_emi_Info_Goal_2: See how down payment changes the loan
Tool_car_loan_emi_Info_Alt_Fd_When: Saving for a larger down payment first.
Tool_car_loan_emi_Info_Differentiation: FinYatra shows financed insurance and a clear prepayment what-if.
Tool_car_loan_emi_Info_Motto: Drive the deal, not just the EMI.
Tool_education_loan_Description: Education loan EMI with moratorium period. Section 80E tax deduction.
Tool_education_loan_LearnText: During the course (moratorium), interest usually accrues. Many lenders capitalise it into the principal when EMIs start. Under the old tax regime, Section 80E lets you deduct education-loan interest with no upper limit (for a limited number of years).
Tool_education_loan_FormulaNote: Moratorium interest here is simple interest on the original principal. Actual bank rules may compound or require interest servicing during study.
Tool_education_loan_CourseHint: Interest accrues; EMI starts after this period.
Tool_education_loan_TaxBody: First-year interest ≈ {0}. Estimated tax saving at your slab ≈ {1}. Confirm eligibility and years remaining with a tax advisor.
Tool_education_loan_ScenarioSubtitle: Same capitalised principal, different EMI tenures
Tool_education_loan_ExampleStep_4: EMI runs for 8 years on that amount.
Tool_education_loan_ExampleStep_5: 80E may save tax on interest paid each year (old regime).
Tool_education_loan_Step_1: Accrue simple interest over the course years.
Tool_education_loan_Step_3: Compute EMI for the repayment tenure.
Tool_education_loan_Info_Purpose: Project EMI after moratorium and estimate Section 80E tax relief.
Tool_education_loan_Info_WhyKnow: Moratorium interest can quietly inflate the amount you repay.
Tool_education_loan_Info_RealLife: Engineering/MBA abroad, comparing bank education loans.
Tool_education_loan_Info_Alt_Salary_When: To see if EMI fits take-home after joining.
Tool_education_loan_Info_Differentiation: FinYatra capitalises moratorium interest and shows an 80E estimate side by side.
Tool_education_loan_Info_Motto: Study the loan before you study the course.
Tool_stamp_duty_Description: Stamp duty and registration charges by state. Women buyer concessions.
Tool_stamp_duty_LearnText: Stamp duty and registration are paid when you register a property. Rates differ by state, and some states offer a lower stamp rate for women buyers. Always verify the latest circle rates and notifications before paying.
Tool_stamp_duty_FormulaNote: Rates here are illustrative averages for planning. Local municipal / state rules, property type, and circle rate can change the actual bill.
Tool_stamp_duty_StateHint: Illustrative rates — confirm with your registrar.
Tool_stamp_duty_WomenHint: Applies only in states that publish a women concession.
Tool_stamp_duty_ConcessionBody: Estimated stamp saving vs general rate: {0}.
Tool_stamp_duty_ExampleTitle: Worked example: ₹50 lakh flat in Maharashtra
Tool_stamp_duty_ExampleStep_5: A women concession (where available) reduces stamp further.
Tool_stamp_duty_Step_1: Take agreement / circle value (higher usually applies).
Tool_stamp_duty_Step_2: Apply state stamp % (with women concession if any).
Tool_stamp_duty_Info_Purpose: Estimate stamp duty and registration by state, including women concessions.
Tool_stamp_duty_Info_WhyKnow: Closing costs are often 5–10% of property value and must be paid in cash upfront.
Tool_stamp_duty_Info_RealLife: Buying a flat, comparing states, joint ownership with a woman co-buyer.
Tool_stamp_duty_Info_Alt_Home_When: After you know the purchase price.
Tool_stamp_duty_Info_Alt_Fd_When: Saving the stamp cash ahead of registration.
Tool_stamp_duty_Info_Differentiation: FinYatra shows state-wise illustrative rates and women concessions in one place.
Tool_stamp_duty_Info_Motto: Price the paperwork before you price the flat.
